/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/AeroBaseIndia.dir/src/controllers/AuthController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AeroBaseIndia.dir/src/controllers/BaggageController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AeroBaseIndia.dir/src/controllers/BookingController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AeroBaseIndia.dir/src/controllers/FlightController.cc.o CMakeFiles/AeroBaseIndia.dir/src/controllers/FlightSocketController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AeroBaseIndia.dir/src/controllers/GateController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AeroBaseIndia.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o AeroBaseIndia  /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a -lpqxx /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpq.so -lhiredis /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -luuid -lpthread -ldl /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so -lyaml-cpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpq.so -lpthread
